appraisal_events.evidence: Usant des formes mi-artistes, mi-galantes, par lesquelles il savait plaire à la princesse... « Voici la charmante princesse ! ... C’est très joli, ma chère princesse. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator frames Swann’s witty, gallant speech—pitched to please the princesse and to be overheard—as effective salon performance, elevating his rhetorical and social poise.

status_effects.explanation: Swann gains local footing as a deft, pleasing speaker through his stylized compliment.
